location: Chance drop (2%) from large Demi-Humans; most reliably farmed from the group right outside the entrance to Volcano Cave, Mt. Gelmir, or from the large Demi-Humans just below the ledge at the start of Coastal Cave, Limgrave.
tactics: There is no guaranteed ground pickup for this weapon — it's purely a 2% chance drop, so expect to fight the same group repeatedly (resting at a grace respawns them).
The large Demi-Humans outside Volcano Cave's entrance are a tight cluster good for farming; the ones below the ledge at Coastal Cave work just as well earlier in the game.
'Large' Demi-Humans hit noticeably harder than the small ones in the same packs — don't underestimate them at low levels.
lore: A club with rows of beast fangs bound around its striking head; demi-humans treat owning one as a mark of status, even though the fangs are really just there to tear open wounds.

builds.name: Early Strength Bleed
builds.why: D/D scaling and a built-in bleed passive make it a decent stopgap bleed-Strength weapon before better options appear.
